prompt: Is our color palette accessible enough for the schools we sell to? They require WCAG AA.

assertions.text: Runs the bundled checker in audit mode against globals.css
Reports results for BOTH light and dark themes
Cites the correct AA thresholds (4.5:1 text, 3:1 large/non-text)
Flags at least the genuine failures (e.g. muted-foreground light, sidebar-primary-foreground)
Applies interpretation rather than blindly listing every fail (notes decorative border exemption or large-text/color-alone nuance)
Does not edit any token values (audit was read-only request)
